# Weblancia — Premium Digital Agency

## About
Weblancia is a premium digital agency based in Fès, Morocco, specializing in web development, UI/UX design, SEO, branding, and digital marketing for ambitious businesses across French and English markets.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2018
- Headquarters: Fès, Morocco
- Services: Web Development, UI/UX Design, SEO, Branding, Digital Marketing, Consulting, E-commerce, Mobile Development
- Website: https://app.weblancia.com
- Contact: contact@weblancia.com
- Academy: academy@weblancia.ma
- Phone: +212 6 64 83 68 41
- Social: LinkedIn (https://linkedin.com/company/weblancia), Twitter (@weblancia), Instagram (@weblancia), YouTube (@weblancia)
- Business Hours: Monday - Friday, 9:00 - 18:00
- Service Areas: Morocco (Casablanca, Rabat, Marrakech, Fès) and international

## Services
- **Web Development**: Custom websites, e-commerce platforms, web applications using Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL
- **UI/UX Design**: User experience research, wireframing, prototyping, visual design, accessibility audits
- **SEO**: Technical SEO, content strategy, local SEO, link building, Core Web Vitals optimization
- **Branding**: Brand identity, logo design, brand guidelines, visual systems, brand strategy
- **Digital Marketing**: Social media strategy, content marketing, email marketing, paid advertising
- **Consulting**: Digital strategy, technology advisory, digital transformation, IT consulting
- **E-commerce**: Shopify, WooCommerce, custom e-commerce solutions, payment integration
- **Mobile Development**: Cross-platform mobile apps, React Native, Progressive Web Apps

## Academy
Weblancia Academy offers courses, workshops, certificates and resources in web development, design, and digital marketing. Located at https://app.weblancia.com/academy

## Content
- Blog: https://app.weblancia.com/insights — articles on web development, design, SEO, and digital strategy
- Case Studies: https://app.weblancia.com/work — portfolio of client projects
- Academy: https://app.weblancia.com/academy — educational resources (courses, workshops, certificates)
- Services: https://app.weblancia.com/services — full service catalog
- Sitemap: https://app.weblancia.com/sitemap — complete site index

## Related Links
- Consultation: https://app.weblancia.com/consultation — book a personalized strategy session
- Careers: https://app.weblancia.com/about/careers — join our team
- Contact: https://app.weblancia.com/contact — get in touch
- Legal: https://app.weblancia.com/legal — terms, privacy policy, cookie policy

## FAQs
- What does Weblancia do? A premium digital agency offering end-to-end web development, design, SEO, and marketing services.
- Where is Weblancia based? Fès, Morocco, serving clients globally.
- What technologies does Weblancia use? Next.js, React, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, Node.js.
- How to contact Weblancia? Email contact@weblancia.com or call +212 6 64 83 68 41.
- Does Weblancia offer training? Yes, via Weblancia Academy at https://app.weblancia.com/academy
- What industries does Weblancia serve? E-commerce, SaaS, education, healthcare, finance, and more.
